vocab.meaning: gương cầm tay nhỏ gọn (thường có nắp đậy)
vocab.example: I always keep a sleek compact mirror in my bag for quick touch-ups throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: thói quen chăm sóc diện mạo
vocab.example: My grooming habits are quite low-maintenance, so I rarely feel the need to carry a personal mirror.

vocab.meaning: tự ti/lo lắng về (vẻ bề ngoài)
vocab.example: I'm not particularly self-conscious about my appearance, so carrying a mirror isn't a priority for me.

vocab.meaning: có thể thu nhỏ/thu lại được
vocab.example: I have a small, retractable mirror that clips onto my keychain for emergencies.
Most mirrors are too clunky and cumbersome to carry around in a small clutch bag.
In this digital age, I often use the reflective surface of my smartphone screen instead of a real mirror.

vocab.meaning: duy trì vẻ ngoài chỉn chu/lịch sự
vocab.example: For professional meetings, carrying a mirror helps me ensure I maintain a polished look.
A pocket mirror is a handy accessory to have when you're traveling and lack access to a proper restroom.
Due to the fragile nature of glass, I worry that carrying a mirror in my backpack might lead to a mess.
The front-facing camera on my phone has essentially rendered traditional pocket mirrors obsolete for me.
